name: 500px
description: Specs and technical requirements for 500px photo uploads, portfolios, and licensing.

items.name: Photo Upload
items.notes: JPEG only; store originals externally — 500px resizes for display; maximum 30 megapixels recommended

items.name: Minimum Dimensions
items.dimensions: 1980 px on the long edge minimum
items.notes: Images below minimum resolution may be rejected from the Licensing Marketplace

items.name: Recommended Dimensions
items.notes: Higher resolution improves licensing eligibility; images served up to 2048 px in-browser

items.name: Licensing-Ready Photo
items.notes: Must meet minimum resolution and quality gates for the 500px Licensing Marketplace

items.name: Profile Photo / Avatar
items.notes: Displayed as a circle in the photographer profile and comments

items.name: Profile Cover Image
items.notes: Wide banner image shown behind the photographer's profile header

items.name: Photo Description
items.notes: Supports plain text; shown on the photo detail page

items.name: Username
items.notes: Alphanumeric and underscores; forms the public profile URL

items.name: Portfolio Gallery
items.notes: Free accounts: 7 photo limit per upload batch. Awesome/Pro accounts: unlimited uploads

items.name: Gallery Cover
items.notes: The first photo in a gallery is used as its cover by default

items.name: Sponsored Photo Placement
items.notes: 500px does not currently offer a self-serve ad product; partner and brand collaborations managed through the 500px team

items.name: License Submission (Commercial)
items.notes: Commercial license buyers receive high-res downloads; photos must pass quality and IP review
